ddls:
CREATE TABLE "presidents" (
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each president */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the president */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the president (if applicable) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the president */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the president's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the president's term */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the president */,
  "vice_president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vice president's unique identifier */,
  "home_state" TEXT /* Home state of the president */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death of the president (if applicable) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death of the president (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("president_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presidents_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the political party was founded */,
  "dissolved_year" INTEGER /* Year the political party was dissolved (if applicable) */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the political party (e.g., conservative, liberal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "significant_events" TEXT /* Description of significant events during the president's term */,
  "key_legislation" TEXT /* Key legislation passed during the president's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the presidential election */,
  "winning_president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning president's unique identifier */,
  "losing_candidate" TEXT /* Name of the major opponent in the presidential election */,
  "popular_vote" INTEGER /* Total number of popular votes in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winning_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biographies" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biography record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the president */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the president */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the president (if applicable) */,
  "death_place" TEXT /* Place of death of the president (if applicable) */,
  "spouse" TEXT /* Name of the president's spouse (if applicable) */,
  "children" TEXT /* Names of the president's children (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biographies_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party affiliation record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party's unique identifier */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the president started affiliation with the party */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the president ended affiliation with the party (if applicable) */,
  "party_position" TEXT /* Position held within the party (e.g., chairman, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "event_year" INTEGER /* Year the event occurred */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., General Election, Primary) */,
  "fundraising_amount" REAL /* Total amount raised during the campaign */,
  "running_mate" TEXT /* Name of the running mate (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vice_presidents" (
  "vice_president_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vice president */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the vice president */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the vice president (if applicable) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the vice president */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the vice president's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the vice president's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vice_president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, educator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the database */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., president data, election data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date of the poll */,
  "approval_rating" REAL /* Approval rating of the president in the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the public statement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the public statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_statements_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presidential_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order record */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's unique identifier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the presidential order */,
  "order_text" TEXT /* Text of the presidential order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presidential_orders_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)
